basic.description:
{Basic Offence}
Increases 10% melee damage and casts Bloodlust at battle opening for 10 rounds

advanced.description:
{Advanced Offence}
Increases 20% melee damage and casts Bloodlust at battle opening for 20 rounds

expert.description:
{Expert Offence}
Increases 30% melee damage and casts Bloodlust at battle opening for 40 rounds
